ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the employee */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the employee */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job title of the employee */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Status of the employee (e.g., active, inactive, pending, suspended) */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  "hiring_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was terminated */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_titles" (
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job title */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Name of the job title */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job title */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "salary_range_min" TEXT /* Minimum salary range for the job title */,
  "salary_range_max" TEXT /* Maximum salary range for the job title */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_titles_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_departments" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started in the department */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the department */,
  "role" TEXT /* Specific role the employee has in the department */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's supervisor in the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_departments_supervisor_id FOREIGN KEY ("supervisor_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "active_date" TEXT /* Date the status became active */,
  "inactive_date" TEXT /* Date the status became inactive */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits of the employee */,
  "pay_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of payroll (e.g., weekly, bi-weekly, monthly) */,
  "tax_deductions" TEXT /* Total tax deductions */,
  "net_salary" TEXT /* Net salary after deductions */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the salary was paid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "cost_per_month" TEXT /* Monthly cost of the benefit */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for eligibility for the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_benefits" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the benefit */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started receiving the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee stopped receiving the benefit */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the employee enrolled in the benefit */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date the employee terminated the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id", "benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" TEXT /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., quantitative, qualitative) */,
  "metric_weight" TEXT /* Weight or importance of the metric */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who reviewed the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR Staff, Manager, Admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job history entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "job_title_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job title */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the employee started in the job */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the employee left the job */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the job change (e.g., promotion, demotion, transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_job_title_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_title_id") REFERENCES job_titles ("job_title_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_history_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary entry */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the employee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the salary started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the salary ended */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the salary change (e.g., promotion, performance review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
